summary: Comprehensive testing of VoiceWallet app completed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows tested and working (100%). Auth, transaction CRUD, dashboard stats, chat/Jarvis AI, profile features, theme toggle, and navigation all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All testID attributes properly implemented for testing
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from responses
React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
Auth flow working with Bearer token in Authorization header
Expo Router navigation working correctly with file-based routing
Theme context properly implemented with AsyncStorage persistence
API integration working correctly with proper error handling
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded test user (test.user@example.com) with session token test_session_1774814917103. Created test transactions during testing which can be cleaned up by filtering TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs verified with pytest (10/10 passed). Frontend UI tested with Playwright - login, dashboard, transactions CRUD, chat/Jarvis AI, profile, theme toggle, and navigation all working. Test credentials: session token test_session_1774814917103, user test.user@example.com. App uses Expo Router for navigation, AsyncStorage for session persistence, and expo-audio for voice recording.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected.
